DP.170.0000:
I love how my girl has so much
vivacity and charm.
DP.170.0001:
Thanks to you, my girl’s been in
a really happy mood.
DP.170.0002:
By any chance, do you have a Pokémon
called MEDICHAM?\f
If you do, would you like to trade
your MEDICHAM for my HAUNTER?
DP.170.0003:
Haha! Did my HAUNTER turn into
something else? Just kidding!\f
I made it hold something that
prevents it from evolving.\f
Please treat my HAUNTER nicely!
I’ll be good to your MEDICHAM, too!
DP.170.0004: What I asked for was a MEDICHAM...?
DP.170.0005:
It’s OK if you don’t want to.\f
But if you change your mind, let’s
trade Pokémon.
DP.170.0006:
Thanks to Pokémon, we got to be
friends, didn’t we?
